Style: 6th Edition Make a Style selection * 6th Edition --- * 5th Edition --- * Frensh --- See 0 options with no featured offers * ← * 1 * → ### Purchase options and add-ons --- Sign in to continue | Brand | CATAN | | ----------------- | --------- | | Material | Cardboard | | Theme | Fantasy | | Genre | Strategy | | Number of players | 3 to 4 | --- # About this item * INTERNATIONAL SUCCESS: a classic game with international acclaim, loved by millions of players worldwide. * INCREASED REPLAYABILITY: modular board that adds increased replayability, ensuring each game is unique. * PLAYER INTERACTION: constant interaction between players, making each game dynamic and engaging. * AWARD-WINNING GAME: a game that has won multiple awards, recognized for its quality and innovation. * STRATEGY AND NEGOTIATION: requires players to be strategic and skilled negotiators to become the ruler of the lands and seas. › See more product details Report an issue with this product --- ## Frequently bought together This item: CATAN 6th Edition (English) - Build & Settle in The Classic Strategy Games for Family - Kids & Adults - Ages 10+ - 3 to 4 Players - 90 to 120 Min Playtime - Made by Asmodee $56.95$56.95 Get it by **Thursday, May 28** In Stock Ships from and sold by Amazon.ca. + CATAN Exp: Seafarers - 6th Edition (English) - Board Games - Strategy/Expansion - Explore New Islands and Build Ships - Ages CATAN Exp: Seafarers - 6th Edition (English) - Board Games - Strategy/Expansion - Explore New Islands and Build Ships - Ages 10+ - 3 to 4 Players - 90 to 120 Minute Playtime - Made by Asmodee $61.07$61.07 Get it by **Thursday, May 28** In Stock Ships from and sold by Amazon.ca.
